name: Freeze / Snapshot Hasher
description: Canonical JSON + SHA-256 content identity for circuit definitions, training configurations, and any JSON manifest. Produces `freeze:<sha256>` hashes that are stable across key reorderings and insignificant whitespace. Introduced in ACT-019.

integrity.reference: ACT-019 self-reference — this plugin IS the freeze primitive; its entrypoint is hashed with raw SHA-256

author: Tanner Jacobsen
